'''Harme Kiela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] of the [[Eiattu pirates]] who attempted to trap [[Air Marshal]] [[Von Asch]] into rejoining the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Asch quickly rejected the offer, though, claiming that the pirates were a disgrace to the Empire. Kiela pointed his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] at Asch's head, but was immediately shot at by [[New Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. He was then arrested by the New Republic, but later fled from his prison.

{{Char-stub}}
